expectation: Follow basic instructions and ask and answer routine questions appropriate to the topic.

expectation: Listen and respond to simple 5W and 1H questions.

expectation: With guidance and support, engage in collaborative conversations and relate personal experience or story information by asking and answering simple yes/no, 5W, and 1H questions using gestures, words, and simple phrases.

expectation: Evaluate information and determine appropriate responses to answer questions effectively.

expectation: Use common verbal and nonverbal gestures, single words, and simple phrases when interacting with others, retelling texts, and recounting experiences. KINDERGARTEN
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Contribute to social, academic, college, and career conversations using accurate and appropriate language.
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: React to conversations, texts, and oral presentations orally or using physical actions and other means of nonverbal communication to show comprehension (e.g., to express feelings, opinions, etc.).

subject: Inglés
expectation: Provide, justify, and defend opinions or positions in speech.

subject: Inglés
expectation: With guidance and support, offer opinions about a topic or text using simple single-word or short-phrase answers with respect and tolerance.

expectation: Produce simple statements or beliefs using sentence starters or language models.

expectation: Adjust language choices according to the task, context, purpose, and audience.

subject: Inglés
expectation: Describe personal experiences and familiar topics using vocabulary and details appropriate to the situation and filling in gaps in oral English with first language.

subject: Inglés
expectation: Plan and deliver different types of oral presentations/reports to express information and support ideas in social, academic, college, and career settings.

subject: Inglés
expectation: Plan and deliver brief oral presentations on a variety of familiar topics using illustrations, words, phrases, or vocabulary from a text. (e.g., integrating technological/digital resources)
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Retell simple events in a proper sequence, and describe familiar activities, topics, or objects in group, sharing activities and using gestures, key vocabulary, and simple phrases.

subject: Inglés
expectation: Recite, memorize, or present, rhymes, poems, or songs. KINDERGARTEN Foundational Skills The Foundational Skills Standard is aimed at fostering the student’s understanding and working knowledge of print concepts, the alphabetic principle, and other basic conventions of the English writing system. These foundational skills are not independent objectives; rather, they are necessary and important components of an effective, comprehensive reading program. Instruction should be differentiated: good readers will need much less practice with these concepts than struggling readers. The objective is to discern when students need attention in these skills.
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Print concepts
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Demonstrate understanding of the organization and basic features of print.
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Follow words from left to right, top to bottom, and page by page.

subject: Inglés
expectation: Recognize that spoken words are represented in written language by specific sequences of letters.

subject: Inglés
expectation: Recognize that the alphabet consists of consonants and vowels.

subject: Inglés
expectation: Understand that words are separated by spaces in print.

subject: Inglés
expectation: Recognize and name all upper- and lowercase letters of the alphabet.

subject: Inglés
expectation: Recognize that print conveys specific meaning and that pictures may support meaning.

subject: Inglés
expectation: Phonological awareness (rhyming, blending, segmentation, deletion, isolation, substitution)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Demonstrate understanding of spoken words, syllables, and sounds (phonemes).

subject: Inglés
expectation: Recognize, generate, and produce rhyming words, including nonsense words.

subject: Inglés
expectation: Identify syllables through actions (e.g., clapping).
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Manipulate sounds and words in shared, guided, and independent activities, such as singing, chanting, or participating in finger plays. KINDERGARTEN
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Count, pronounce, blend, and segment syllables in spoken words.
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Blend 2 and 3 phonemes to recognize words. Segment onsets and rimes (e.g., all, ap, op, ip, ug) of monosyllabic spoken words.
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Isolate and pronounce the initial, medial vowel, and final sounds (phonemes) in 3-phoneme (short and long sound patterns). This does not include CVCs ending with /l/, /r/, or /x/.
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Add or substitute individual sounds (phonemes) with 3 phonemes in simple, monosyllabic words to make new words.
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Phonics and word recognition
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Understand and apply grade-level phonics and word analysis skills to decode short and long sound patterns.
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Demonstrate basic knowledge of one-to-one letter-sound correspondences by producing the primary sounds or many of the most frequent sounds for each consonant (e.g., a, m, t, p, o, n, c, d).
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Associate the long and short sounds with common spellings (graphemes) for the 5 major vowels. Identify which letters represent the 5 major vowels (Aa, Ee, Ii, Oo, and Uu) and understand the long and short sound of each vowel. More complex long vowel graphemes and spellings are targeted in the grade 1 phonics standards.
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Read common high-frequency words by sight (e.g., the, of, to, you, she, my, is, are, do, does) (50 or more).
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Distinguish between similarly spelled words by identifying the sounds of the letters that differ.
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Fluency
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Read emergent reader texts with purpose and understanding. KINDERGARTEN Reading The Reading Standard places equal importance on the complexity of what students read and the skill with which they read. This standard defines a grade-by-grade level of text complexity that starts with beginning reading and increases up to the college and career-readiness high school level. When reading or viewing multimedia resources, the student must also demonstrate a growing ability to understand or use texts, make connections among ideas and between texts, and use textual evidence to support comprehension.
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Read critically to make logical inferences and cite specific textual evidence to support conclusions drawn from the text.
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: With prompting and support, describe ideas, phenomena (e.g., parts of a plant), and textual elements (e.g., characters) based on understanding a variety of read-aloud texts or multimedia viewing.
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Determine main ideas or themes of a text and analyze their development. Summarize the key supporting details and ideas.
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Analyze how and why individuals, events, or ideas develop and interact over the course of a text.
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Interpret words and phrases as they are used in a text, determining technical, connotative, and figurative meanings. Analyze how specific word choices shape meaning or tone.
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Analyze the structure of a text, including how specific sentences, paragraphs, and larger portions of the text (e.g., sections, chapters, scenes, or stanzas) relate to each other and to the whole.
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Recognize common types of texts (e.g., storybooks, story organization [beginning, middle, and end], poems). Identify the front cover, back cover, and title page of the book.

subject: Inglés
expectation: Identify rhyme in a poem.

subject: Inglés
expectation: Assess how point of view or purpose shapes the content and style of a text.

subject: Inglés
expectation: Integrate and evaluate content presented in diverse media and formats.

subject: Inglés
expectation: Use illustrations (picture cues) to identify story details and categorize similarities and differences between characters and details within a variety of texts (e.g., nursery rhymes, folktales, etc.) or when viewing multimedia resources.

subject: Inglés
expectation: Use titles, headings, and illustrations to predict and confirm text topics.

subject: Inglés
expectation: Delineate and evaluate an author’s argument through evidence specified in a text.

subject: Inglés
expectation: Begins in grade 1.
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Compare and contrast two or more authors’ presentations of similar themes or topics.

subject: Inglés
expectation: Read and comprehend complex literary and informational texts independently and proficiently.
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Actively engage in group read-alouds of nursery rhymes, folk tales, and developmentally appropriate poetry with purpose and understanding. KINDERGARTEN Writing The Writing Standard develops the student’s capacity and skills to plan, revise, edit, and publish many types of writing, such as arguments, informational/explanatory texts, and narratives. This standard stresses the importance of the reading-writing connection by requiring students to draw upon and write about evidence from literary and informational texts/media or when writing for research and investigations.
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Write arguments to support point of view using valid reasoning and relevant evidence.
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Use a combination of drawing and labeling to express preferences and opinions (e.g., My favorite book is...).
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Write informational texts to examine and convey complex ideas and information clearly and accurately through the selection, organization, and analysis of relevant content.
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Use a combination of drawing and labeling to compose short informational texts to describe what they are writing about and supply some information about the topic.

subject: Inglés
expectation: Write literary texts to develop real or imagined experiences or events using effective technique, details, and structure.

subject: Inglés
expectation: With guidance and support, express opinions about a topic or text with at least one supporting reason.

subject: Inglés
expectation: Develop and strengthen writing as needed by using the writing process (planning, drafting, revising, editing, rewriting, and publishing).

expectation: Brainstorm ideas for writing by drawing illustrations.

expectation: Use technology, including the internet, to interact and collaborate with others and produce and publish writing.
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: With guidance and support from adults, explore a variety of digital tools to produce and publish writing, including collaboration with peers.

subject: Inglés
expectation: Use a multimedia element to enhance a written task. Multimedia elements may include, but are not limited to, drawings, pictures, artifacts, audio, or digital representations. At this grade level, the element should relate to the task. It does not require but can include the use of computers. KINDERGARTEN
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Conduct research projects of varying lengths based on focused questions to demonstrate understanding of the subject.

subject: Inglés
expectation: Identify various sources that can be used to gather information (e.g., library books, magazines, the internet) or to answer questions (e.g., How do we find out?).

subject: Inglés
expectation: Draw evidence from literary or informational texts to support analysis, reflection, and research.

expectation: Remember information about experiences or gather information from various sources (e.g., word walls, book talks, weather charts, routine tasks) to answer a question.

subject: Inglés
expectation: Write routinely over short and extended periods of time for a variety of tasks, purposes, and audiences.

subject: Inglés
expectation: With guidance and support, use a combination of drawing, dictating, invented and creative writing, and/or labeling a picture with a few words following a prompt. Language The Language Standard is presented as a summary of the skills and abilities that support the understanding of essential rules of written and spoken English. The vocabulary focuses on understanding and acquiring new general, academic, and content-specific words and phrases.
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Demonstrate command of English grammar and usage conventions.
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Demonstrate command of English grammar and usage conventions when writing or speaking.
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Print all upper- and lowercase letters (the alphabet).
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Use common nouns and present tense of basic verbs (e.g., I walk home.).
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Produce simple sentences, phrases, or words with basic structure that include adjectives (e.g., The dog is big.).

subject: Inglés
expectation: Understand and use question words (interrogatives) (e.g., who, what, where, when, why, and how)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Use the most frequently occurring prepositions (e.g., in, on, under).

subject: Inglés
expectation: Apply appropriate English capitalization, punctuation, and spelling conventions.
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Demonstrate command of English capitalization, punctuation, and spelling conventions when writing.
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Capitalize the first word in the sentence and the pronoun I.

subject: Inglés
expectation: Recognize and name end punctuation as a period. KINDERGARTEN

subject: Inglés
expectation: Write a letter or letters for most consonant and short vowel sounds (phonemes).

subject: Inglés
expectation: Spell simple words phonetically, drawing on knowledge of sound-letter relationships with correct spelling and spacing.

subject: Inglés
expectation: Consult reference materials, including picture dictionaries, as needed to check and correct spellings, finding words by the first letter.

subject: Inglés
expectation: Demonstrate understanding of how language functions in different contexts, making effective choices for meaning, style, and comprehension.

subject: Inglés
expectation: Use knowledge of language and its conventions when writing, speaking, reading, or listening.

subject: Inglés
expectation: Determine or clarify the meaning of unknown words and phrases by using context clues, analyzing meaningful word parts, and consulting reference materials.
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Determine or clarify the meaning of unknown and multiple-meaning words and phrase-based on class reading and content area study, choosing flexibly from an array of strategies.
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Use context clues and illustrations to identify the meaning of unfamiliar words, including compound words. wo
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Demonstrate understanding of figurative language, word relationships, and variation in word meanings.
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Demonstrate understanding of word relationships and differences in word meanings.
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Act out word meanings. Demonstrate increasing specificity of vocabulary (e.g., transitioning from calling something an animal to calling it a dog or a cat).

subject: Inglés
expectation: Recognize, sort, and classify common objects into basic categories (e.g., shapes, foods) to gain meaning. Relate vocabulary to background knowledge.
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Make and explain connections between words and their usage including synonyms and antonyms (e.g., emotions: happy, sad, etc.; or family members: funny, old, etc.).
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Accurately use a variety of social, academic, and content-specific words and phrases sufficient for reading, writing, speaking, and listening at the college and career-readiness level.
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)

subject: Inglés
expectation: Use words and phrases acquired through conversations or read-alouds or when responding to text. Listening/Speaking The Listening/Speaking Standard develops a range of broadly useful oral communication and interpersonal skills, including those used for formal or informal presentations. The student learns to communicate, collaborate, and listen to ideas; strategically integrate information from oral, visual quantitative, and media sources to evaluate what they hear, use, and display, helping to achieve communicative purposes, and adapt speech to context and task.
source: DEPR Estándares de Contenido y Expectativas de Grado — Inglés (2022)
